name: Find Matching PKS Module Parts in ClusterCAD
description: Finds matching natural PKS modules in the ClusterCAD database for a single module with specified domain properties. Call this once per module in a design. Accepts simple scalar inputs (loading status, AT substrate, reduction domains present) and returns cluster matches with amino acid sequences for all domains.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Is this a loading/starter module? true for the first module in a PKS, false for extension modules.

inputs.name: at_substrate
inputs.description: AT substrate name, e.g. 'Malonyl-CoA', 'Methylmalonyl-CoA'. Leave empty if unspecified.

inputs.name: reductive_domains
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of active reduction domains present in this module, e.g. 'KR,DH,ER' or 'KR' or ''. Only 'KR', 'DH', 'ER' are recognized. Leave empty if no reductive domains.

inputs.name: max_matches
inputs.description: Maximum number of ClusterCAD matches to return (default 3).

outputs.description: Object with keys: loading (bool), at_substrate (str or null), reductive_domains (array of str), total_matches (int), matches (array of cluster results each with accession, cluster_name, subunit_name, subunit_id, module_label, and domains array with domain_type, domain_id, annotation, and aa_sequence), and warnings (array of str).

examples.notes: Loading module with Malonyl-CoA AT, no reduction domains.
Extension module with methylmalonyl-CoA AT and full reductive loop.

trigger_phrases: search for natural PKS modules with this domain profile
find parts for a loading module with Malonyl-CoA
get amino acid sequences for a module with KR and DH
what natural modules match this architecture
find ClusterCAD matches for this module
